mnemonics.title: IoT Differentiators - IPCI
mnemonics.content: To remember key IoT differentiators: Internet Protocol, Platform (Cloud), Collaboration (Data Integration), Intelligence (Analytics). M2M often lacks these.

mnemonics.title: M2M = Machine, IoT = Intelligence
mnemonics.content: M2M focuses on the Machine (hardware, direct links). IoT focuses on Intelligence (data analytics, cloud, integration). Think: M for Machine, I for Intelligence.

mnemonics.title: M2M Characteristics - PHIL
mnemonics.content: PHIL: Point-to-point, Hardware-centric, Isolated silos, Legacy protocols. These define M2M limitations.

mnemonics.title: IoT vs M2M Quick Test
mnemonics.content: Ask 3 questions: Does it use the Internet? Does it send data to the Cloud? Does it integrate with other systems? If YES to all three, it is IoT, not just M2M.
